records.system_name_en: Guyana Horse Racing Authority legal context
records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Guyana Horse Racing Authority or an officially recognised racecourse publishes a stable current calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The official Act establishes the authority framework but does not provide a current meeting calendar.
limitations: The source is legal and explanatory rather than a current racing calendar.
No current meeting dates, racecourses, or recurring calendar routes are approved.
Unofficial event promotion must not generate current calendar rows.
records.notes: Keep Guyana out of current-calendar output until a current official meeting source is reviewed.
